calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Modifying Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Continued To Oct-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vivian Redsar for petitioner Tim Kasta.

The Court stated that he had no problem with the requested modification to the power of appointment, but that he did have an issue with the modification to establish a trust protector with the power to modify the terms of the trust at will. Ms. Redsar stated that themodification was intended to give the trust protector the power to change administrative provisions only. The Court replied that the language as proposed was too broad to be imterpreted so narrowly. Ms. Redsar said she would like to file an amendment to narrow the language, and asked for a one month continuance. The matter was continued to October 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)
